scripts.build: tsc --project config/tsconfig.dashboard.json && tsc --project config/tsconfig.login.json && tsc --project config/tsconfig.sideNavBar.json && tsc --project config/tsconfig.appointments.json && tsc --project config/tsconfig.billing.json && tsc --project config/tsconfig.patients.json && tsc --project config/tsconfig.settings.json && tsc --project config/tsconfig.topNavBar.json && tsc --project config/tsconfig.router.json && tsc --project config/tsconfig.create-account.json && tsc --project config/tsconfig.management-panel.json && tsc --project config/tsconfig.edit-profile.json
scripts.db:setup: node -e "console.log('Run the SQL file in db/schema.sql on your local MariaDB instance')"
